summary: Large Home-Run Contest stage decomp PR centered on src/melee/gr/grhomerun.c. It implemented previously stubbed grHomeRun functions, added concrete Home-Run stage local state layout and signatures, fixed nearby grhomerun header/types declarations, and made a few formatting-only cleanups in unrelated files. The decomp.dev bot reported 4 new full matches and 5 improved unmatched items, with matched code increasing by +748 bytes.
what_changed: Implemented grHomeRun_8021CB20, a large initialization routine that sets up stage JObjs, allocates arrays for scrolling ground objects and jobj gobjs, creates a camera GObj/SIS text context, installs mpJointSetCb1, creates rear background objects, scales JObjs by grHr_804D6AE4, and initializes Home-Run stage flags.

Implemented grHomeRun_8021D680, the per-frame/update routine that tracks fighter/bat-related GObjs, updates camera subject flags, creates distance text on demand, scrolls/recycles generated ground segments based on camera interest, repositions rear background strips, updates bounds, and calls mpLib/mpJoint update helpers.

Implemented grHomeRun_8021E500, a ground segment factory that selects map object ids from arg0 modulo grHr_804D6ADC, creates the object, applies scale/translation, records gv.homerun.xD0, xC6, and xC4, and returns the generated HSD_GObj.

Implemented fn_8021E994 as a typed collision callback using CollData and mpLib_GroundEnum; it looks up ground object 0xA and sets the Home-Run main vars xE8_flags.b0 when a specific collision condition involving gm_80180AF4 is observed.
Added a local grHomeRun_MainGroundVars overlay in grhomerun.c for fields stored inside gp->gv.homerun, including arrays of HSD_GObj pointers, text/JObj/GObj pointers for UI/rear layers, and bitflags.
Added grHomeRun_8021C82C_noinline using #pragma dont_inline to force an out-of-line wrapper around grHomeRun_8021C82C for matching-sensitive call sites.
Changed grHomeRun_8021EDD4 from taking an unused int to void and updated grHomeRun_8021C754 to call it without an argument.

Adjusted grHomeRun_8021EA30 expression structure by introducing a float temporary for the grHr_804D6ADC * 160.0F * scale denominator and simplifying the US-language conversion to result *= 0.304788; bot output says this reached 100%.
Reworked grHomeRun_8021EC58 to use typed s32 input, a static "%d" string grHr_804D49D0, external GXColor/f32 constants, pos_z 0.0F, and explicit repeated Ground_801C0498 scale expressions.
Updated grhomerun.h prototypes from UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS to concrete signatures for grHomeRun_8021E500, fn_8021E994, grHomeRun_8021EC58, and grHomeRun_8021EDD4; added mp/forward.h for mpLib_GroundEnum.
Extended struct grHomeRun_GroundVars in src/melee/gr/types.h with f32 xD0.
Made minor formatting/include-order cleanups in ftPp_SpecialLw.c, gm_18A5.c, gmclassic.c, gricemt.c, gmresultplayer.c, lbbgflash.c, mnnamenew.c, and tydisplay.c.
smart_moves: Used a local overlay struct for Home-Run main ground variables rather than prematurely reshaping the global grHomeRun_GroundVars for every field; this allowed matching of current functions while keeping uncertain layout scoped.
Introduced a noinline wrapper for grHomeRun_8021C82C, which is a targeted codegen tactic for preserving original call structure in repeated object-creation paths.
Converted callback and factory prototypes from unknown macros to real types only where the diff had enough evidence, especially HSD_GObj*, Ground*, CollData*, mpLib_GroundEnum, and f32.
Kept line-numbered HSD_ASSERT calls in newly decompiled functions, preserving source-line-sensitive matching behavior common in Melee decomp.
Matched float code by preserving repeated calls and temporaries instead of over-simplifying algebraically equivalent expressions.
Let decomp.dev metrics guide scope: the PR accepted partial progress for large functions while fully matching smaller adjacent functions.
decomp_lessons: For stage files with scrolling/background object pools, reconstruct the runtime local state first: arrays of generated GObjs, rear layer GObjs, text pointers, and bitfields can unlock large update/init routines.
Do not assume unused parameters are real; grHomeRun_8021EDD4 matched after changing the signature from int to void and updating callers.

Function-pointer and callback signatures should be made concrete once their call sites reveal the callback ABI; here mpJointSetCb1 required an mpLib callback signature with CollData and mpLib_GroundEnum.
Matching floating-point arithmetic may require explicit temporaries and repeated helper calls rather than natural C simplification.
Static format strings such as "%d" can be necessary for matching SIS/text routines and sdata layout.
When recursive or helper creation calls inline incorrectly, a pragma noinline shim can be cleaner than distorting the main function logic.
Header improvements should include forward headers for newly concrete types; grhomerun.h needed mp/forward.h once mpLib_GroundEnum appeared in a public prototype.
naming_conventions: Stage functions keep the grHomeRun_8021XXXX address-based naming until semantic names are known.
File-scope Home-Run globals use the grHr_804DXXXX / grHr_804DBCXX address-derived convention.
Unknown struct fields retain offset names such as xCC, xD0, xD4, and xE8_flags until behavior is better understood.
Bitfields inside temporary layout overlays are named b0 through b7 when semantics are not yet proven.
Typed callback still uses fn_8021E994 because no semantic name was evidenced in the PR.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: #pragma push / #pragma dont_inline on / #pragma dont_inline reset / #pragma pop around grHomeRun_8021C82C_noinline to preserve call boundaries.
Use of PAD_STACK(8) in grHomeRun_8021CB20 and existing PAD_STACK cleanups where needed for stack shape.
HSD_ASSERT calls with exact-looking line numbers such as 0x17A, 0x1A2, 0x239, and 0x3D5 were retained in new code.
Expression splitting in grHomeRun_8021EA30 with float new_var improved matching.
Function-pointer cast spacing and GXColor compound literal spacing were normalized in adjacent files, likely style/formatting rather than semantic changes.
External sdata/sdata2 symbols grHr_804DBC74, grHr_804DBC78, grHr_804DBC7C, grHr_804DBC80, and grHr_804DBC84 were used to drive text setup without inventing semantic names.
review_feedback: No human review comments or reviews were present in the slice.
decomp.dev bot reported 4 new full matches: fn_8021E994 (+156 bytes), grHomeRun_8021C754 (+6), grHomeRun_8021EA30 (+2), and grHomeRun_8021EDD4 (+1).
decomp.dev bot reported partial improvements: grHomeRun_8021CB20 to 88.42%, grHomeRun_8021D680 to 90.03%, grHomeRun_8021E500 to 93.52%, .sdata2 to 89.66%, and .sdata to 54.10%.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that finish matching grHomeRun_8021CB20 after this 88.42% version.
Find later PRs that finish matching grHomeRun_8021D680 after this 90.03% version.
Find later PRs that finish matching grHomeRun_8021E500 after this 93.52% version.
Search whether grHomeRun_MainGroundVars fields xCC/xD0/xD4/rear_gobj/xE8_flags.b0 later receive semantic names.
Search for other stage PRs using noinline wrappers around object factory functions for matching.
